name: Union Square
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Minutes
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Board of Supervisors. Finance and Labor Committee
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1999 Finance and Labor Committee record on leasing the Union Square Public Parking Garage, a supplemental park-maintenance agreement, and revenue bonds financing the garage's seismic retrofit and expansion alongside improvements to Union Square Park.
